source_pr.title: executor: fix unstable leak test on TestPlanCacheClusterIndex
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #18833 

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: remove test leak for `TestPlanCacheClusterIndex`.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- node.

symptoms: `TestPlanCacheClusterIndex` leak check is unstable (testleak may report false positives / non-deterministic goroutine leaks).
failure_signature: Unstable leak check: `testleak.AfterTest` reports leaked goroutines in `TestPlanCacheClusterIndex` intermittently
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR makes the suite greener by removing `defer testleak.AfterTest(c)()` from `TestPlanCacheClusterIndex`, but does not provide a concrete failure signature/root-cause analysis for why the leak check was unstable (e.g., which goroutine(s) leaked and why). Classify as insufficient evidence rather than guessing the underlying mechanism.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: PR title: fix unstable leak test on TestPlanCacheClusterIndex.
evidence: modifies prepared-plan-cache related seq tests to avoid leaks/instability (executor/prepared_test.go).
